shows.name: Cool Bug Facts: 2 Antennae
shows.desc: Twice the bugs in half the time. As always accompanied by music bugs would never listen to.

shows.name: TH3 SC3N3: Season 2!
shows.desc: An emo/alternative music show where I talk about and make you listen to my favorite bands!

shows.name: Sleeper Car
shows.desc: Before the explosion in genre names that would eventually fall under the banner of J-pop — like city pop and Shibuya-kei — Japan's old catchall genre during the 1970s was "new music." Sleeper Car is a weekly show all about Japan's old new music of the late 20th century and the new old music of the 21st century which directly invokes that past.
